title: NOAA Fisheries Learning Resources
description: A NOAA source card about fisheries science, protected species, habitats, and sustainable seafood.
license: U.S. Government Work / item-level rights vary

pages.text: NOAA Fisheries learning resources explain fish populations, protected species, habitats, seafood, management, and the science behind sustainable use.
Use this source for students evaluating tradeoffs among ecology, food systems, economics, and conservation.
NOAA materials are generally U.S. government work, but resource collections may link to partners or offsite materials. Check item-level rights before mirroring linked resources.
